title: Half-naked body of woman (24) found
description: KWANONQABA NEWS - The half-naked body of a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News","html":"Breaking News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KWANONQABA NEWS - The half-naked body of a 24-year-old woman was found in New Rest in Mossel Bay on Saturday.","html":"KWANONQABA NEWS - The half-naked body of a 24-year-old woman was found in New Rest in Mossel Bay on Saturday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Police spokesperson, Sgt Chris Spies says residents made the gruesome discovery in a bushy area in KwaNonqaba at around 06:50.","html":"Police spokesperson, Sgt Chris Spies says residents made the gruesome discovery in a bushy area in KwaNonqaba at around 06:50."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Spies says police were called to the scene and shortly thereafter paramedics declared the victim dead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He says the motive for the killing is not yet known.","html":"He says the motive for the killing is not yet known."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Crime scene experts combed the scene for clues and all leads are being followed.”","html":"“Crime scene experts combed the scene for clues and all leads are being followed.”"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The name of the deceased has not yet been released."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KwaNonqaba police have opened a murder docket.","html":"KwaNonqaba police have opened a murder docket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone with information can contact the investigating officer Wo Geoffrey Moos at 044 606 5608/7.","html":"Anyone with information can contact the investigating officer Wo Geoffrey Moos at 044 606 5608/7."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The motive for this killing is yet to be established. It forms part of the ongoing police investigation.","html":"The motive for this killing is yet to be established. It forms part of the ongoing police investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
